items.caption: A medical illustration depicting the degenerative changes that occur in the cartilage of the knee. it shows a cross-sectional view of a knee joint with labels indicating the different parts of the cartilage and the changes that occur with degeneration. the labels include "degeneration of cartilage," "possible increased synovial fluid," "loose cartilage particles," "osteophyte," and "loss of cartilage." the illustration is educational and informative, designed to explain the concept of knee cartilage degeneration.
